zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow於1090年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow20歲，母親Devrail Dorothy Cruachan18歲。他於1105年之後與Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1120年在他的家鄉享年30歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow于1090年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow20岁，母亲Devrail Dorothy Cruachan18岁。他于1105年之后与Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1120年在他的家乡享年30岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特吉爾可雷南。

nameMeanings.name: Campbell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic cam ‘crooked, bent’ + beul ‘mouth’. As a result of folk etymology, the surname was often represented in Latin documents as de bello campo ‘of the fair field’, which led to the name sometimes being ‘translated’ into Anglo-Norman French as Beauchamp .
Irish (North Armagh): adopted for Gaelic Mac Cathmhaoil ‘son of Cathmhaol’ (literally ‘battle chief’): see Caulfield and Cowell .
English: variant of   Camel  , under the influence of the Scottish name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Campell
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: variant of   Campbell   (see also   Camel  ).

variants.name: Beauchamp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Antoine, Jacques, Yves, Andre, Armand, Emile, Fernand, Marcel, Marthe, Remi, Alcide, Camille.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of several places in France, for example in Manche and Somme, that are named with Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + champ(s) ‘field, plain’ (from Latin bello campo ‘beautiful field’). In English the surname is generally pronounced Beecham . Compare Bushaw .
English: in some cases, an Anglo-Norman French adaptation of Scottish Campbell , by translation into French of the folk etymology de campo bello ‘from the fair field’.

variants.name: Camel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Napoleon, Patrice.

English (of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Norman French came(i)l ‘camel’ (from Latin camelus, classical Greek kamēlos), possibly denoting a clumsy person or someone with long legs. It may also be a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with a sign depicting a camel (although surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English); compare 5 below.
English: possibly a habitational name from Queen Camel and West Camel in Somerset, early recorded as Camel(le), possibly a Celtic name from canto- ‘border, district’ and mēl ‘bare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Cailen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kale
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps an Anglicized form of the Irish name Cathal. It may have been invented as a masculine equivalent of   Kayley   and its variants.

nameMeanings.name: Maol
meanings: Found as a baptismal name, and corrupted from Mary.

nameMeanings.name: Maith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun denoting the quality of believing and trusting in God. The name began to be used in the 16th century, was very popular among the Puritans of the 17th, and is presently enjoying a modest comeback.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow was born in 1090, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow, was 20 and his mother, Devrail Dorothy Cruachan, was 18. He married Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct after 1105. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1120, in his hometown, at the age of 30, and was buried in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow est né en 1090, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Devrail Dorothy Cruachan, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct après 1105. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1120, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat nach 1105 Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1120 im Alter von 30 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow è nato il nel 1090 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Devrail Dorothy Cruachan, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct dopo il 1105. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1120, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochowが1090年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochowは20歳，母Devrail Dorothy Cruachanは18歳であった。1105年以後にMarjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sctと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1120年に故郷で30歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトキルチレナンにて埋葬された。

ko.Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow(이)가 1090년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Devrail Dorothy Cruachan(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1105년 이후 Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1120년 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 킬크리난에 묻혔다.

ru.Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow родился в 1090 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Devrail Dorothy Cruachan, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct после 1105 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1120 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности килчренан, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Cailen Maol Maith Campbell 4th Campbell of Lochow nació en 1090, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Duncan MacDurine Campbell of Lochow, 3rd Lord of Lochow, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Devrail Dorothy Cruachan, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Marjory-Rus Ni Swyfns Dunkeld of Scotland wife of Cailen Campbell 'sct después de 1105. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1120, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Kilchrenan, Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido.
